index_index.label: index_index
index_index.wxml: <page><view class="container theme-dark"><view class="header"><text class="title"></text><text class="subtitle"></text></view><view class="stats-section"><view class="stat-card"><text class="stat-value"></text><text class="stat-label"></text></view><view class="stat-card"><text class="stat-value"></text><text class="stat-label"></text></view><view class="stat-card"><text class="stat-value"></text><text class="stat-label"></text></view><view class="stat-card"><text class="stat-value"></text><text class="stat-label"></text></view></view><view class="quick-actions"><text class="section-title"></text><view class="action-grid"><navigator class="action-item" url="/pages/resources/list" role="link"><text class="action-icon"></text><text class="action-text"></text></navigator><navigator class="action-item" url="/pages/accounts/list" role="link"><text class="action-icon"></text><text class="action-text"></text></navigator><navigator class="action-item" url="/pages/terraform/list" role="link"><text class="action-icon"></text><text class="action-text"></text></navigator><navigator class="action-item" url="/pages/team/members" role="link"><text class="action-icon"></text><text class="action-text"></text></navigator></view></view><view class="activity-section"><text class="section-title"></text><view class="activity-empty"><text class="empty-text"></text></view></view></view></page>

agent_chat.label: agent_chat

lang.chat_confirm_content:
将执行计划: {title}
执行模式: {mode}

agent_chat.wxml: <page><view class="chat-container theme-dark"><view class="chat-header"><text class="header-title"></text><view class="header-actions"><text class="header-btn"></text><picker class="mode-picker" range="[{"label":"仅生成方案","value":"plan_only"},{"label":"分步确认","value":"step_confirm"},{"label":"风险审查模式","value":"risk_review"},{"label":"全自动执行","value":"auto_execute"}]" range-key="label" value="risk_review" aria-haspopup="true"><view class="mode-display">                    <text class="icon-arrow"></text></view></picker></view></view><scroll-view scroll-with-animation="" scroll-y="" class="message-list"><view class="messages"></view></scroll-view><view class="input-area"><input class="message-input" placeholder="输入指令" value="">输入指令</input><button class="send-btn" role="button" aria-disabled="false">发送</button></view></view></page>

resources_list.label: resources_list

lang.res_empty_hint: 请先添加云账号并创建资源

user_profile.label: user_profile
user_profile.wxml: <page><view class="container theme-dark"><view class="profile-header"><view class="avatar">U</view><text class="user-name"></text><text class="user-email"></text></view><view class="settings-card"><view class="setting-item"><text class="setting-label"></text><switch checked="" aria-checked="true" color="#6366f1" role="checkbox" aria-disabled="false"></switch></view><view class="setting-item"><text class="setting-label"></text><switch checked="" aria-checked="true" color="#6366f1" role="checkbox" aria-disabled="false"></switch></view><view class="setting-item"><text class="setting-label"></text><picker range="["中文","English"]" value="0" aria-haspopup="true"><view class="setting-value">中文</view></picker></view></view><view class="settings-card"><navigator class="setting-item nav-item" url="/pages/accounts/list" role="link"><text class="setting-label"></text><text class="setting-arrow"></text></navigator><navigator class="setting-item nav-item" url="/pages/team/members" role="link"><text class="setting-label"></text><text class="setting-arrow"></text></navigator><navigator class="setting-item nav-item" url="/pages/terraform/list" role="link"><text class="setting-label"></text><text class="setting-arrow"></text></navigator><navigator class="setting-item nav-item" url="javascript:void(0)" role="link"><text class="setting-label"></text><text class="setting-arrow"></text></navigator><navigator class="setting-item nav-item" url="javascript:void(0)" role="link"><text class="setting-label"></text><text class="setting-arrow"></text></navigator><navigator class="setting-item nav-item" url="javascript:void(0)" role="link"><text class="setting-label"></text><text class="setting-arrow"></text></navigator></view><view class="about-card"><view class="setting-item"><text class="setting-label"></text><text class="setting-value"></text></view></view><button class="btn-logout" role="button" aria-disabled="false">退出登录</button></view></page>

resources_detail.label: resources_detail
resources_detail.wxml: <page><view class="container theme-dark"><view class="page-header"><navigator class="btn-back" url="/pages/resources/list" role="link">← 返回</navigator><text class="page-title"></text></view><view class="detail-card"><view class="detail-row"><text class="detail-label"></text><text class="detail-value"></text></view><view class="detail-row"><text class="detail-label"></text><text class="detail-value"></text></view><view class="detail-row"><text class="detail-label"></text><status-badge is="components/StatusBadge/StatusBadge"><view class="StatusBadge--status-badge StatusBadge--status-warning">warning</view></status-badge></view><view class="detail-row"><text class="detail-label"></text><text class="detail-value"></text></view><view class="detail-row"><text class="detail-label"></text><text class="detail-value"></text></view><view class="detail-row"><text class="detail-label"></text><text class="detail-value"></text></view></view><view class="action-bar"><button class="btn-action btn-delete" role="button" aria-disabled="false">删除资源</button></view></view></page>

accounts_list.label: accounts_list

lang.acc_empty_hint: 点击上方按钮添加您的第一个云账号
lang.acc_delete_content: 确定要删除此云账号吗？

accounts_list.wxml: <page><view class="container theme-dark"><view class="page-header"><text class="page-title"></text><navigator class="btn-add" url="/pages/accounts/add" role="link">+ 添加云账户</navigator></view><view class="account-list"></view><view class="empty-state"><text class="empty-icon"></text><text class="empty-text"></text><text class="empty-hint"></text></view></view></page>

accounts_add.label: accounts_add
accounts_add.wxml: <page><view class="container theme-dark"><view class="page-header"><text class="page-title"></text></view><view class="form-card"><view class="form-group"><text class="form-label"></text><cloud-selector is="components/CloudSelector/CloudSelector"><view class="CloudSelector--cloud-selector"><view class="CloudSelector--selector-title">选择云平台</view><view class="CloudSelector--cloud-list"><view class="CloudSelector--cloud-item CloudSelector--active" data-index="0"><view class="CloudSelector--cloud-icon">☁️</view><view class="CloudSelector--cloud-name">Azure</view></view><view class="CloudSelector--cloud-item" data-index="1"><view class="CloudSelector--cloud-icon">🌐</view><view class="CloudSelector--cloud-name">腾讯云</view></view><view class="CloudSelector--cloud-item" data-index="2"><view class="CloudSelector--cloud-icon">🔶</view><view class="CloudSelector--cloud-name">Oracle Cloud</view></view><view class="CloudSelector--cloud-item" data-index="3"><view class="CloudSelector--cloud-icon">⚡</view><view class="CloudSelector--cloud-name">Render</view></view></view></view></cloud-selector></view><view class="form-group"><text class="form-label"></text><input class="form-input" placeholder="请输入账户名称" value="">请输入账户名称</input></view><view class="form-group"><text class="form-label"></text><input class="form-input" placeholder="请输入 Access Key" value="">请输入 Access Key</input></view><view class="form-group"><text class="form-label"></text><input class="form-input" placeholder="请输入 Secret Key" type="password" value="">请输入 Secret Key</input></view><view class="form-group"><text class="form-label"></text><input class="form-input" placeholder="例如: eastus" value="">例如: eastus</input></view></view><button class="btn-submit" disabled="" aria-disabled="true" role="button">保存账户</button></view></page>

team_members.label: team_members

textBlocks: 邀请成员加入您的团队协作管理云资源

lang.team_empty_hint: 邀请成员加入您的团队协作管理云资源

team_members.wxml: <page><view class="container theme-dark"><view class="page-header"><text class="page-title"></text><button class="btn-invite" role="button" aria-disabled="false">+ 邀请成员</button></view><view class="member-list"></view><view class="empty-state"><text class="empty-icon"></text><text class="empty-text"></text><text class="empty-hint"></text></view></view></page>

terraform_list.label: terraform_list

textBlocks: 上传 Terraform 配置文件来管理基础设施

lang.tf_empty_hint: 上传 Terraform 配置文件来管理基础设施
lang.tf_confirm_deploy_content: 确定要部署此 Terraform 配置吗？

terraform_list.wxml: <page><view class="container theme-dark"><view class="page-header"><text class="page-title"></text><navigator class="btn-upload" url="/pages/terraform/upload" role="link">+ 上传配置</navigator></view><view class="tf-list"></view><view class="empty-state"><text class="empty-icon"></text><text class="empty-text"></text><text class="empty-hint"></text></view></view></page>

terraform_upload.label: terraform_upload
terraform_upload.wxml: <page><view class="container theme-dark"><view class="page-header"><navigator class="btn-back" url="/pages/terraform/list" role="link">← 返回</navigator><text class="page-title"></text></view><view class="upload-card"><view class="upload-area"><text class="upload-icon"></text><text class="upload-text"></text><text class="upload-hint"></text></view></view></view></page>
